name: Southwestern Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square pan or large cast iron skillet.
3. Mix the dry ingredients together and make a well in the center.
4. Add eggs, butter, and sour cream, then blend thoroughly.
5. Fold in corn kernels.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan. Cover with grated cheese and chiles.
7. Pour the remaining batter on top.
8. Add bacon bits if desired.
9. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes.
